text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating your vegetables. A balanced diet gives your body the energy and nutrients it needs, while regular exercise strengthens your heart, muscles, and bones. However, physical health is only one part of the picture. Getting enough quality sleep each night is essential for both your body and mind to recover. Equally important is looking after your mental health. This means managing stress, taking time for activities you enjoy, and keeping a good work-life balance. By caring for all these areas, you create a foundation for feeling your best every day.
